name: Codex
description: OpenAI Codex desktop app for managing coding agents, built on GPT-5 with terminal access, file editing, and autonomous task execution

extraction.note: Separate appcasts for arm64 and x64. Intel uses appcast-x64.xml. Items may not be in chronological order — compare all sparkle:version values.

download.note: Separate downloads for arm64 and x64 architectures

changelog.url: included in sparkle:releaseNotesLink field of appcast item

notes: OpenAI Codex is a separate desktop app from ChatGPT. Uses Sparkle for auto-updates with separate appcast feeds for Apple Silicon (appcast.xml) and Intel (appcast-x64.xml). Stores user data in ~/.codex and ~/Library/Application Support/Codex.
